samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register, 0 to 16.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="i">
            <description>Shift count register updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <statement>
                <if>
                    <condition>
                        <negation>
                            <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                        </negation>
                    </condition>
                    <then>
                        <assignment>
                            <identifier>i</identifier>
                            <constant>0</constant>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assignment>
                            <identifier>i</identifier>
                            <binary>
                                <identifier>i</identifier>
                                <constant>1</constant>
                            </binary>
                        </assignment>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="done_r">
            <description>Multiplication completion flag updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <statement>
                <if>
                    <condition>
                        <negation>
                            <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                        </negation>
                    </condition>
                    <then>
                        <assignment>
                            <identifier>done_r</identifier>
                            <constant>0</constant>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <if>
                            <condition>
                                <binary>
                                    <identifier>i</identifier>
                                    <constant>16</constant>
                                </binary>
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <assignment>
                                    <identifier>done_r</identifier>
                                    <constant>1</constant>
                                </assignment>
                            </then>
                            <else>
                                <if>
                                    <condition>
                                        <binary>
                                            <identifier>i</identifier>
                                            <constant>17</constant>
                                        </binary>
                                    </condition>
                                    <then>
                                        <assignment>
                                            <identifier>done_r</identifier>
                                            <constant>0</constant>
                                        </assignment>
                                    </then>
                                </if>
                            </else>
                        </if>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="yout_r">
            <description>Product register updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <statement>
                <if>
                    <condition>
                        <negation>
                            <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                        </negation>
                    </condition>
                    <then>
                        <assignment>
                            <identifier>yout_r</identifier>
                            <constant>0</constant>
                        </assignment>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <if>
                            <condition>
                                <binary>
                                    <identifier>i</identifier>
                                    <constant>0</constant>
                                </binary>
                            </condition>
                            <then>
                                <assignment>
                                    <identifier>areg</identifier>
                                    <input>ain</input>
                                </assignment>
                                <assignment>
                                    <identifier>breg</identifier>
                                    <input>bin</input>
                                </assignment>
                            </then>
                            <else>
                                <if>
                                    <condition>
                                        <binary>
                                            <identifier>i</identifier>
                                            <constant>17</constant>
                                        </binary>
                                    </condition>
                                    <then>
                                        <assignment>
                                            <identifier>yout_r</identifier>
                                            <identifier>yout_r</identifier>
                                        </assignment>
                                    </then>
                                </if>
                                <else>
                                    <if>
                                        <condition>
                                            <binary>
                                                <index>
                                                    <identifier>areg</identifier>
                                                    <binary>
                                                        <identifier>i</identifier>
                                                        <constant>1</constant>
                                                    </binary>
                                                </index>
                                                <constant>1</constant>
                                            </binary>
                                        </condition>
                                        <then>
                                            <assignment>
                                                <identifier>yout_r</identifier>
                                                <binary>
                                                    <identifier>yout_r</identifier>
                                                    <binary>
                                                        <identifier>breg</identifier>
                                                        <identifier>i</identifier>
                                                    </binary>
                                                </binary>
                                            </assignment>
                                        </then>
                                    </if>
                                </else>
                            </else>
                        </if>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The module performs multiplication of two 16-bit unsigned numbers using shift and accumulate operations. 
    It has input signals for clock, reset, start, multiplicand, and multiplier, along with output signals for the product and completion flag.
    On the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset, the shift count register 'i' is updated. 
    If reset is low, 'i' is set to 0. If 'start' is high and 'i' is less than 17, 'i' increments by 1.
    
    On the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset, the multiplication completion flag 'done_r' is updated. 
    If reset is low, 'done_r' is set to 0. If 'i' is equal to 16, 'done_r' is set to 1, indicating the end of multiplication. 
    If 'i' is equal to 17, 'done_r' is reset to 0.
    
    On the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset, the shift and accumulate operation is performed. 
    If reset is low, the multiplicand register 'areg', multiplier register 'breg', and product register 'yout_r' are reset to 0. 
    If 'start' is high, the multiplicand and multiplier are stored in 'areg' and 'breg', respectively, if 'i' is 0. 
    If 'i' is greater than 0 and less than 17, the product register 'yout_r' accumulates the shifted value of 'breg' by 'i-1' positions if the bit at position 'i-1' in 'areg' is high.
    </implementation>
</module>
